# Alpine Mar

> Alpine Mar CPAs & Advisors is a Fort Lauderdale, Florida CPA firm providing tax
> planning, outsourced accounting, fractional CFO, transaction advisory, and audit
> & attestation services to businesses and high-net-worth individuals. Members of
> AICPA and FICPA. Phone (954) 743-0147 · hello@alpinemar.com.

## Services

### Tax
- [Tax Planning](https://alpinemar.com/services/tax-planning-services/)
- [Tax Strategy](https://alpinemar.com/services/tax-advisory-and-compliance/)
- [Individual Tax](https://alpinemar.com/services/individual-tax-services/)
- [Partnership Tax](https://alpinemar.com/services/partnership-tax-services/)
- [Corporate Tax](https://alpinemar.com/services/corporate-tax-services/)
- [S Corps](https://alpinemar.com/services/s-corp-cpa-services/)
- [Estate & Trust Tax Planning](https://alpinemar.com/services/estate-trust-tax-planning/)
- [Private Client Services](https://alpinemar.com/services/private-client-services/)
- [Small Business Tax](https://alpinemar.com/services/small-business-tax-services/)
- [International Tax](https://alpinemar.com/services/international-tax-services/)
- [Non-Profit Tax](https://alpinemar.com/services/non-profit-tax-services/)
- [Multistate Tax](https://alpinemar.com/services/multistate-tax-services/)
- [Business Tax](https://alpinemar.com/services/business-tax/)
